decisions.reasoning: Since this is a mirror matchup with speed ties, using Parting Shot allows me to pivot out safely while lowering the opponent's offensive stats, gaining momentum without risking a speed tie loss.
Since both Incineroars are identical and speed-tied, Knock Off is the optimal play to remove the opponent's item and gain information while dealing neutral damage.

Calyrex-Ice is at 70% and risks being 2HKOed by Flare Blitz while being slower than Incineroar. Switching to my own Incineroar allows me to Intimidate the opponent and safely pivot, preserving Calyrex-Ice for a better matchup later.
Since both Incineroars are at similar HP and resist each other's STAB moves, Parting Shot is the best way to maintain momentum, lower the opponent's stats, and bring in a more threatening sweeper.

Incineroar is threatened by a 2HKO from Drain Punch and cannot KO Iron Hands back. Switching to Flutter Mane provides an immunity to Drain Punch and forces the opponent to switch or risk a super-effective hit.
I outspeed Iron Hands and Moonblast is a guaranteed OHKO, fulfilling the primary decision priority.

Rillaboom threatens an OHKO with Wood Hammer or Drum Beating, and Flutter Mane cannot secure the KO this turn. Switching to Incineroar provides a safe pivot that resists Rillaboom's STAB moves and threatens it with Intimidate.
Flare Blitz is a guaranteed OHKO on Rillaboom. Since I have a clear KO path, I must take it to remove the opponent's threat immediately.
Incineroar is at low HP and cannot win this trade; Parting Shot allows me to pivot safely while debuffing the opponent's attack, maintaining momentum for a stronger teammate.

My Incineroar is at 21% and will likely be KOed by any move from the opponent's Incineroar. Switching to Flutter Mane preserves my Incineroar for a potential Intimidate pivot later and brings in a faster, higher-damage threat.

Incineroar is guaranteed to OHKO Flutter Mane with Flare Blitz, and I cannot OHKO it in return. Switching to my own Incineroar allows me to resist the Flare Blitz and potentially pivot or Intimidate the opponent.
My Incineroar is at 18% and cannot win this 1v1; Parting Shot allows me to pivot safely into a healthier teammate while lowering the opponent's stats to maintain momentum.

My Incineroar is at 18% and will likely be KO'd by any move from the opponent's Incineroar. Switching to Flutter Mane preserves my Incineroar's Intimidate utility for later and brings in a faster, high-damage threat.

Flutter Mane is threatened with an OHKO by Flare Blitz and cannot secure a KO this turn. Switching to Incineroar allows me to resist the incoming Fire-type attack and potentially utilize Intimidate to mitigate damage.

My Incineroar is at 12% HP and will likely be KO'd by any move from the opponent. Parting Shot allows me to pivot out safely, lowering the opponent's stats for my incoming teammate and maintaining momentum.
My Incineroar is at 5% HP and will be KO'd by any chip damage; switching to Flutter Mane preserves momentum and allows me to threaten the opponent with higher speed.
Flutter Mane is threatened with an OHKO by Flare Blitz and cannot secure a KO this turn. Switching to Incineroar provides a safe pivot to absorb the hit, as it resists Fire-type moves.

My Incineroar has fainted, so I must send in a replacement. Kingambit is the best choice here to resist potential Dark-type moves and threaten the opponent's Incineroar with its superior offensive presence.

Flutter Mane is guaranteed to be OHKO'd by Flare Blitz and cannot secure a KO on Incineroar this turn. Switching to Calyrex-Ice preserves Flutter Mane for later while bringing in a bulkier threat that can handle Incineroar's attacks better.

Calyrex-Ice is at 55% HP and will be KO'd by Flare Blitz next turn, while High Horsepower only 2HKOs Incineroar. Switching to Flutter Mane preserves Calyrex-Ice for later and forces Incineroar to deal with a faster threat.

Flutter Mane is guaranteed to be OHKO'd by Flare Blitz and cannot secure a KO on Incineroar this turn. Switching to Calyrex-Ice preserves Flutter Mane for a potential revenge kill later while bringing in a bulkier mon to tank the incoming hit.

Calyrex-Ice is at 39% HP and will be KO'd by Incineroar's Flare Blitz next turn. Switching to Kingambit resists the incoming Flare Blitz and allows me to threaten Incineroar with a powerful STAB move while preserving Calyrex-Ice for a potential late-game cleanup.

Flutter Mane is at 11% and will be OHKOed by Flare Blitz or 2HKOed by Knock Off, and cannot secure a KO this turn. Switching to Kingambit provides a resistance to Dark-type moves and allows for a safer pivot to handle Incineroar.

Calyrex-Ice is at 24% and will be KOed by Flare Blitz next turn, so I must maximize damage output before fainting. High Horsepower is a 2HKO and my best chance to eliminate or severely weaken the Incineroar.
